category_sources: Official GitHub README describes it as a CloudTrail and IAM policy toolbox.
source_facts.description says it extracts valuable information out of AWS CloudTrail.
docs_sources: No separate dedicated docs site was found in the supplied facts; README is the official documentation surface.
Official repository README contains installation, usage, FAQ, and development documentation.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository README describes the project and contains releases/source.
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository topics include aws, security, cloud, iam, aws-cloudtrail, cloudtrail, and security-automation.
